creator: ian.carolan@proton.me
text:
Further Update:

I have since updated the BIOS to 16.01 and today to 16.02 with no change in the boot freeze. I also note that the nic is failing with an invalid checksum message.

This Github report https://github.com/NixOS/nixpkgs/issues/202067 suggests that there is no point checking for a valid checksum on this motherboard nic and that if the checksum check is disabled the nic functions correctly.
